# FreightMynd

> AI-powered operations intelligence for sea, air & freight forwarders. Custom-built AI systems that replace manual freight operations. Built by Bitontree. Trusted by a global freight forwarder.

Last updated: 2026-06-08

FreightMynd is an AI automation company that builds custom document intelligence, quote automation, and freight operations systems for freight forwarders and logistics providers. Founded in 2019 and built by Bitontree, FreightMynd deploys purpose-built AI systems in 4-8 weeks that integrate directly with CargoWise, SAP TM, Oracle TMS, and other freight management platforms. Unlike SaaS freight automation tools, FreightMynd systems are owned by the client with no subscription or vendor lock-in.

FreightMynd competes with SaaS freight automation platforms like Raft (formerly Vector.ai), Zauber, Expedock, and Shipamax. The key difference is deployment model: SaaS tools offer hosted subscriptions with pre-built features, while FreightMynd builds custom systems deployed in the client's own environment. The global freight forwarding market moves $19 trillion in goods annually, yet most operations still run on manual document processing and data entry.

## Solutions

- [4PL Control Tower Automation](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/4pl-control-tower-automation): Full document intelligence pipeline — email monitoring to CargoWise XML with zero manual entry. 60% processing time reduction.
- [Autonomous Quote Management](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/autonomous-quote-management): Automated RFQ intake, rate comparison, margin optimization, and freight quote generation in minutes.
- [Document Intelligence](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/document-intelligence): AI document processing for logistics — reads, classifies, and extracts data from invoices, AWBs, packing lists, and compliance documents.
- [Freight Pricing AI](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/freight-pricing-ai): Real-time freight rate benchmarking, dynamic pricing optimization, and margin analysis.
- [Sea Freight Automation](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/sea-freight-automation): End-to-end shipping AI for ocean freight — booking, documentation, tracking, and exception management.
- [Air Freight Automation](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/air-freight-automation): AI-powered AWB processing, air freight rates comparison, flight tracking, and customs documentation.
- [3PL & 4PL Operations](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/3pl-4pl-operations): Multi-client workflow orchestration, SLA monitoring, and scalable document processing.
- [Smart Invoice Processing](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/smart-invoice-processing): AI procurement automation — 3-way invoice matching, carrier rate audit, overcharge detection.
- [Freight Revenue Recovery](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/freight-revenue-recovery): AI-powered freight audit that catches carrier overcharges, validates contract rates, and recovers revenue hidden in invoice data. Average recovery: 2-5% of freight spend.
- [Freight Spend Analytics](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/freight-spend-analytics): AI-powered freight spend analytics giving logistics leaders full visibility into carrier costs, lane profitability, and spend trends. Identifies 15-20% cost reduction opportunities.
- [Customs Automation](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/customs-automation): AI customs declaration pre-population, HS code classification, and compliance document processing.
- [Customs Brokerage Automation](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/customs-brokerage-automation): AI for customs brokers, automating invoice extraction, HS classification, denied-party screening, and pre-filling entries in CargoWise Customs, Descartes, and ABI filers. 70% faster filing.
- [Freight Document Automation](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/freight-document-automation): AI document processing for freight — invoices, AWBs, bills of lading, customs forms.
- [TMS Automation](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/tms-automation): AI-powered TMS integration with zero manual data entry.
- [Email Intelligence & Auto-Triage](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/email-intelligence): AI-powered email triage, classification, and auto-response for freight operations — routes RFQs, booking confirmations, and exceptions to the right team instantly.
- [Shipment Visibility & Customer Portal](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/shipment-visibility-portal): White-label tracking portal with real-time shipment visibility, document access, and analytics for your customers.
- [Carrier Performance Analytics](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/carrier-performance-analytics): AI scorecards, lane-level benchmarking, and exception pattern detection across your carrier network.
- [Freight Booking Automation](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/booking-automation): Quote-to-booking automation — carrier allocation, confirmation processing, and amendment management.
- [ETA Prediction & Exception Management](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/eta-prediction-exception-management): Predictive delay detection, proactive alerts, and intelligent exception routing before shipments are impacted.
- [AI SOP Compliance Monitoring](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/sop-compliance-monitoring): Continuous SOP auditing, violation detection, and compliance reporting across freight operations.
- [Order-to-Cash Automation](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/order-to-cash-automation): Cost accruals, auto-invoicing, revenue recognition, and payment reconciliation for freight forwarders.
- [Rate Sheet Intelligence](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/rate-sheet-intelligence): Multi-format rate ingestion, normalisation, and cross-carrier comparison for freight pricing teams.

## TMS Integrations

Native AI integration with major freight management systems — no middleware, no CSV exports:

- [CargoWise](https://freightmynd.com/integrations/cargowise): Direct XML push via eHub and Universal Gateway
- [SAP TM](https://freightmynd.com/integrations/sap-tm): BAPI and RFC integration
- [Oracle TMS](https://freightmynd.com/integrations/oracle-tms): REST API integration
- [Microsoft Dynamics](https://freightmynd.com/integrations/microsoft-dynamics): Dataverse integration
- [Descartes](https://freightmynd.com/integrations/descartes): GLN integration

## Case Studies

- [a global freight forwarder](https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/4pl-control-tower-automation): 4PL control tower automation — 60% processing time reduction, zero manual TMS entry, near-zero failure on 300-page document batches.
- [RFQ Email Intelligence](https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/rfq-email-intelligence): AI-powered RFQ email intelligence and completion system.
- [Historical Email Intelligence](https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/historical-email-intelligence): AI institutional knowledge capture from operational email.
- [Shipping News Intelligence](https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/shipping-news-intelligence): Proactive freight risk detection and live disruption intelligence.
- [RFQ Email Automation](https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/rfq-email-automation): Automated RFQ processing and email automation system.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2019
- Built by: Bitontree (https://bitontree.com)
- Flagship client: a global freight forwarder (500+ offices, 13,000+ employees)
- Deployment timeline: 4-8 weeks from kickoff to production
- Tech stack: Python, LangGraph, Azure, CargoWise API, OpenAI, custom OCR
- Offices: Clifton (US), Gujarat (India)

- Book a free audit: https://freightmynd.com/contact
